name: bigearthnet

ood_protocol.name: bigearth-cross-country
ood_protocol.ref: Sumbul et al. 2019 IGARSS (BigEarthNet); 2024 Geo-Bench framing

facts: 590,326 Sentinel-2 patches over 10 European countries (Jun 2017 - May 2018); 43 CORINE Land Cover classes, multi-label.
hypotheses: Methods that succeed on BigEarthNet cross-country shift also transfer to So2Sat on overlapping geography, because both share the same European-geography shift structure.
Multi-label CORINE is not a clean compositional handle, because it conflates spatial composition with semantic composition.
intuitions: BigEarthNet v2 (BigEarthNet-MM with Sentinel-1 SAR added) likely exists as an extension.
Foundation earth-observation results for 2024-25 probably use this dataset.
Cross-EO transfer studies (BigEarthNet vs So2Sat vs EuroSAT vs SEN12MS) likely exist.
unknowns: CORINE's 43-class taxonomy is European-specific; whether it generalizes to non-EU geographies cannot be determined from BigEarthNet alone.
Whether Sentinel-2 single-revisit (10-day) versus averaged-over-period preparation affects implicit temporal information cannot be assessed from the prepared data.
epistemic_state.boundary: The dataset is Europe-only with T=0 and C=0 (multi-label is label-level, not entity-level composition), so it cannot show temporal or compositional shift.

materialization_status: metadata + Reference Maps materialized (274 MB). BigEarthNet-S1.tar.zst (54 GB) + BigEarthNet-S2.tar.zst (63 GB) deferred — Zenodo record 10891137, URL pattern confirmed working.
